pageContext.name: James Harden SmALL-STARS
pageContext.description: Uniquely stylized collectible art, the James Harden SmALL-Stars 2021 NBA Edition figure is a blend of urban street art and anime-influenced vinyl collectibles. This commemorative edition celebrates James Harden's time in Houston and will be a one-time run.  Limited to 1,000 worldwide and officially licensed by the NBA, this is one collectible figure you don't want to miss out on!
